title: SPLG
description: A Vanilla++ Modpack that features better exploration, better building & some magic.
body:
SPLG (Spel Gang) is a modpack made for a group of friends for a server that I host.
("Spel Gang" is the name of our discord server btw, a very creative name)

This modpack adds a bunch of small tweaks to Minecraft, like; prettier visuals, better building, some magic & general quality of life features.

The main features of this modpack are:
## Better Exploration & World Generation
I've added Distant Horizons, Xaero's map mods, Structory + Structory: Towers & some of YUNG's and Hopo's structure mods. I've also added Terralith, Enderscape, Incendium & Tectonic to improve the terrain generation in the overworld, nether and end. These mods will hopefully improve your experience when exploring the world with more interesting points of interests and terrain. Sophisticated Backpacks and Storage are also included to help you organize your items at home and while exploring.

## More Building Features
There are now a lot more blocks to build with. The modpack features; Supplementaries, Another Furniture, Beautify, Stoneworks, Clayworks, Woodworks & Additional Placements. With these mods it will be easier to get the details that you would like while still keeping the Minecraft style. You will also be able to build with vertical slabs and stairs with Additional Placements.

## Better Farming and Magic
With Farmer's Delight and it's many addons you will be able to create diverse meals using many new ingredients. The magic mod Malum is also included adding new magic combat and augments.
